# Monologg Blog
> Jangwon Park's tech blog about NLP, Machine Learning, and AI Engineering.

## Author
- Name: Jangwon Park
- Role: NLP Engineer
- GitHub: https://github.com/monologg
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jang-won-park/

## Articles
- [2주 간의 KoELECTRA 개발기 - 2부](https://monologg.kr/posts/2020/05/02/koelectra-part2/): 2주 간의 KoELECTRA 개발기 - 2부

- [내가 만든 ELECTRA를 Huggingface Transformers로 Porting하기](https://monologg.kr/posts/2020/05/01/transformers-porting/): 내가 만든 ELECTRA를 Huggingface Transformers로 Porting하기
- [나만의 BERT Wordpiece Vocab 만들기](https://monologg.kr/posts/2020/04/27/wordpiece-vocab/): 나만의 BERT Wordpiece Vocab 만들기
- [TPU를 이용하여 Electra Pretraining하기](https://monologg.kr/posts/2020/04/20/tpu-electra/): TPU를 이용하여 Electra Pretraining하기
